CustomField.formula: IF( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(pro_Actual_Date__c)), pro_Variance_Working_Days__c >= 0), IMAGE("/resource/1730193892000/green_circle?", "green_circle", 20, 20), IF( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(pro_Actual_Date__c)), pro_Variance_Working_Days__c < 0), IMAGE("/resource/1747144606000/red_circle?", "red_circle", 20, 20), IF( AND(ISBLANK(pro_Actual_Date__c), NOT(ISBLANK(pro_Projected_Date__c))), IMAGE("/resource/1730193913000/yellow_circle?", "yellow_circle", 20, 20), NULL ) ) )
CustomField.label: Variance Indicator
